completed_tasks.name: Delete dead patch files, outlook integration, root index.html
Inspect and remove files.zip (SAFE path taken)
Centralise CLAUDE_MODEL env var in note_tidy.py and email_watcher.py
Harden .gitignore with credential patterns and scan git history

human_actions_pending.action: Rotate Google OAuth credentials in Google Cloud Console
human_actions_pending.context: The OAuth token was previously visible in the browser UI at the /auth/google/callback page. Rotation is required for SEC-04 in Phase 2. No git history purge needed (scan was clean).
Code review found pre-existing bug: body_start = 0 means flags-only Claude response corrupts tidied output. Fix: body_start = len(lines). Run /gsd-code-review-fix 1 to auto-fix.

decisions.decision: files.zip classified SAFE — source code only snapshot
decisions.rationale: unzip -l confirmed: main.py, calendar_integration.py, outlook_integration.py, drive_integration.py, requirements.txt. No patient data, no credentials.

decisions.decision: Default fallback claude-sonnet-4-5 used in both modules
decisions.rationale: email_watcher.py had claude-sonnet-4-6; normalised to 4-5 to match main.py — Railway env var controls actual model

decisions.decision: Git history scan clean — no credentials ever committed
decisions.rationale: All four scan commands returned empty. SEC-04 rotation still required (browser UI exposure) but not an emergency purge.

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 2 to capture design decisions for Phase 2: Security Hardening before planning. Note: SEC-04 credential rotation requires human action in Google Cloud Console first.
context_notes: Phase 1 fully executed and verified. All 6 CLEAN requirements satisfied. Code review advisory findings are pre-existing bugs, not regressions. Phase 2 (Security Hardening) is next — involves live endpoint changes so requires more care with active testers on production.
